## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run validate` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] If a new action: added the manifest entry, the `@action({ UUID })` decorator, and the `registerAction(...)` call in `src/plugin.ts`
- [ ] If new user-facing behavior: updated the README and the relevant `CLAUDE.md`
- [ ] Follows the actions-are-stateless-renderers rule (no I/O, polling, or fetch in `src/actions/`)
